case_title: KHOA DIEM THI TRAN et al VS. PETER CHOY et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR JOHN A. MCGUINN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-29-2014 THROUGH DEC-28-2014.
ARBITRATOR MARTE JOSEPH BASSI APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-08-2015 THROUGH APR-08-2015.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, KHOA DIEM THI CHAU, BINH LA, LANH AS TO DEFENDANT CHOY, PETER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-04-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-01-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-19-2013

ARBITRATOR KATE KARDOS-POLEVOI APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-07-2014 THROUGH JUL-06-2014.
ARBITRATOR BRUCE IMAI APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-09-2014 THROUGH DEC-08-2014.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF KHOA THI DIEM TRAN RECOVERS FROM DEFENDANT PETER CHOY THE SUM OF $2,000; PLAINTIFF BINH CHAU RECOVERS FROM DEFENDANT PETER CHOY THE SUM OF $4250; PLAINTIFF LANH LAU RECOVERS FROM DEFENDANT PETER CHOY THE SUM OF $4250. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
